    Enum DwfWhipCapStyleID

    Represents An enumeration of cap styles used by WT_Line_End_Cap, WT_Line_Start_Cap, WT_Dash_End_Cap, and WT_Dash_Start_Cap.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Dwf.Whip.Objects.Service
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public enum DwfWhipCapStyleID

    Fields

    Name Description
    Butt

    Butt cap style
    Capstyle

    Capstyle cap style
    Diamond

    Diamond cap style
    Round

    Round cap style
    Square

    Square cap style
    Undefined

    Undefined cap style
